title: Ability to assign workplans on individual users.
excerpt:
Hi there, 
i think it would be super useful if you could assign different workplans on different individual users instead of the whole team. In our use case some of the team members are less often available than others. …

posts.author: kilianmayrhans (Kilian Mayrhans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
i think it would be super useful if you could assign different workplans on different individual users instead of the whole team. In our use case some of the team members are less often available than others. I know that this can be kind of done with the individual workload capacities in the Workload widget but it´s not that helpful when you can´t see whether a colleague is avaible on a certain day or not.

I hope that maybe more people would like such a feature and i guess it´s not that difficult to implement. I would really appreciate a upvote. Of course i would also be thankful for a nice workaround if you habe one. Many thanks!
